questions: Does the deferred-tail failure still reproduce, and where exactly?
Is the deferred tail a legal state reconcile must accept?
What is the minimal fix with zero caller changes?

findings.summary: _last_chain_hash parses only entries[-1]; raises on deferred tails while build_proposal already derives the link-off ancestors
deferred tails are the legal no-fabrication state reconcile exists to repair; link-off must be the last VALIDLY hashed entry
backward-walk fallback is self-contained (no signature change); zero deferred-tail test coverage today; independently shippable ahead of #271's parser
